title: Turkish Kuru Fasulye Smoothie
description: A refreshing twist on traditional Turkish cuisine, blending kuru fasulye with sweet bananas and a tangy kick.

ingredients.name: Tangy yogurt (e.g., lemon or orange flavored)

instructions: Combine cooked white beans, bananas, and tangy yogurt in a blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy, stopping to scrape down the sides as needed.
Taste and adjust sweetness or tanginess to your liking.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a few chopped nuts, if desired.
